message:
fix(fs): patch instanceof to fix vscode.dev folder listing

- Patch Symbol.hasInstance on FileSystemDirectoryHandle/FileHandle to make
  polyfilled handles pass instanceof checks
- VS Code requires handles to pass instanceof before enumerating directories
- Add dialog.zig module for JS dialog and file chooser handling
- Remove debug logging from polyfill
- Update .gitignore to exclude log and test files
- Remove accidentally tracked log and test files from repo

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,15 @@ vendor/node_modules/
 *.swo
 *~
 .zig-cache/
+
+# Log files
+*.log
 debug.log
 termweb_debug.log
 full_output.log
+build.log
+cdp_debug.log
+termweb_input.log
+
+# Test files
+test_*
